zh.lifeSummary: 當Adolf von der Pfalz於1300年9月27日出生在德國貝也沃爾福拉善森時，他的父親Rudolf I von der Pfalz25歲，母親Mechthild von Nassau20歲。他於1320年與Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhine結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1327年1月29日在海因里希_海普洛文次格拉德巴賀哈特享年26歲，埋葬在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇庫爾斯騰圖姆 普法爾茲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adolf von der Pfalz于1300年9月27日出生在德国貝也沃爾福拉善森时，他的父亲Rudolf I von der Pfalz25岁，母亲Mechthild von Nassau20岁。他于1320年与Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhine结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1327年1月29日在海因里希_海普洛文次格拉德巴賀哈特享年26岁，埋葬在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇庫爾斯騰圖姆 普法爾茲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: der
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Zoltan, Istvan, Janos, Lajos.
Hungarian (Dér): from the old personal name Dér of Turkic origin, or a nickname for a gray-haired man, from the vocabulary word dér ‘hoarfrost’.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 謝, see   Xie   1.

variants.name: Xie
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Hong, Li, Ming, Ying, Min, Qing, Yuan, Bin, Hui, Ping, Wei, Xiaoli, Ding, Chang, Lan, Quan, Cong, Dang, Hai, Tian, Yiping.

Mandarin form of the surname 謝, meaning ‘thank’ in Chinese: (i) from Xie (謝), the name of an ancient state (possibly located in Nanyang in Henan province), annexed around the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ).Later this place was probably granted to Shen Bo (the Earl of Shen), uncle of King Xuan of Zhou (reigned 827–782  BC ). After it was annexed during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), the name of the state was adopted as a surname. (ii) adopted in place of the surname Zhi-Le (直勒) by Xie Xiaozheng (謝孝政), an official during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Pfalz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from the Palatinate (German Pfalz), a region in southwestern Germany.

variants.name: Pfalzgraf
meanings: German: status name for the governor or judge at an imperial court, or for someone in the service of such a dignitary, from Middle High German phalenzgrāve. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine). Compare Pfaltzgraff .

nameMeanings.name: Adolf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adolf von der Pfalz was born on 27 September 1300, in Wolfratshausen, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Rudolf I von der Pfalz, was 25 and his mother, Mechthild von Nassau, was 20. He married Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhine in 1320. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 29 January 1327, in Hardt, Gladbach, Rhineland, Prussia, at the age of 26, and was buried in Palatinate, Holy Roman Empire.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adolf von der Pfalz est né le 27 septembre 1300, à Wolfratshausen, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Rudolf I von der Pfalz, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mechthild von Nassau, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhine en 1320. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 29 janvier 1327, à Hardt, Gladbach, Rhénanie, Prusse, à l’âge de 26 ans, et a été enterré à Kurfürstentum Pfalz, Saint-Empire romain.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adolf von der Pfalz am 27. September 1300 in Wolfratshausen, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rudolf I von der Pfalz 25 und seine Mutter Mechthild von Nassau 20. Er hat 1320 Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 29. Januar 1327 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Hardt, Gladbach, Rheinprovinz, Preußen und wurde in Kurfürstentum Pfalz, Heiliges Römisches Reich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adolf von der Pfalz è nato il il 27 settembre 1300 nel Wolfratshausen, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Rudolf I von der Pfalz, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Mechthild von Nassau, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhine nel 1320. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 29 gennaio 1327, nel Hardt, Gladbach, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, all'età di 26 anni, e fu sepolto a Kurfürstentum Pfalz, Heiliges Römisches Reich.

ja.lifeSummary: Adolf von der Pfalzが1300年9月27日にドイツバイエルンウオルフラトシャウセンで生まれた時，父Rudolf I von der Pfalzは25歳，母Mechthild von Nassauは20歳であった。1320年にLady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1327年1月29日にプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズグラドバチハートで26歳で死去し，ヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチクルフuルステントゥム プファルズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adolf von der Pfalz(이)가 1300년 9월 27일 독일 베이른 울프라츠하우센에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rudolf I von der Pfalz(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mechthild von Nassau(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1320년 Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1327년 1월 29일 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 글라드바치 하르드트에서 26세의 나이로 사망했으며 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 커프u르스투 p팔즈에 묻혔다.

mn.27 Sep 1300–29 Jan 1327: 1300 оны Есдүгээр сарын 27–1327 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 29

pt.27 Sep 1300–29 Jan 1327: 27 de setembro de 1300–29 de janeiro de 1327
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adolf von der Pfalz nasceu em 27 de setembro de 1300, em Wolfratshausen, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Rudolf I von der Pfalz, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mechthild von Nassau, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhine em 1320. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 29 de janeiro de 1327, em Hardt, Gladbach, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, com 26 anos, e foi sepultado em Kurfürstentum Pfalz, Heiliges Römisches Reich.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adolf von der Pfalz родился 27 сентября 1300 г. в местности волфрацхаусен, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Rudolf I von der Pfalz было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mechthild von Nassau, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhine в 1320 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 29 января 1327 г. в местности хардт, гладбач, раинпровинз, Пруссия в возрасте 26 лет и был похоронен в местности курфuрстентум пфалз, хилигесь рoмищесь раич.

es.27 Sep 1300–29 Jan 1327: 27 de septiembre de 1300–29 de enero de 1327
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adolf von der Pfalz nació el 27 de septiembre de 1300, en Wolfratshausen, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Rudolf I von der Pfalz, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mechthild von Nassau, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhine en 1320. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 29 de enero de 1327, en Hardt, Gladbach, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, a la edad de 26 años, y fue sepultado en Kurfürstentum Pfalz, Heiliges Römisches Reich.
